tableSelection.title: Choose a table to practice
tableSelection.description: Pick any table that is ready. Locked tables stay visible so a child can see what opens up next.

tableCard.rewardsNeededMessage: You need {{rewardsNeeded}} more rewards to unlock this table

header.title: Practice the {{table}} times table
header.defaultDescription: Solve each question one by one. Keep going until all 10 are done.

rewardEarned.title: You earned 1 reward
rewardEarned.description: Strong first-try work adds to the child's running collection.

sessionSummary.title: Session summary
sessionSummary.description: Great work. You answered {{correctAnswerCount}} out of {{totalQuestionCount}} questions correctly.
